identity.name: EdgeLog
identity.description: A high-performance trading journal for serious traders. Dark, minimal, and data-centric.

theme.reasoning: Trading apps require reduced eye strain for long sessions. Dark mode is the industry standard (Bloomberg/TradingView).

layout.container: max-w-md mx-auto min-h-screen bg-background text-foreground overflow-hidden relative shadow-2xl border-x border-white/5

buttons.primary: bg-white text-black hover:bg-gray-200 font-bold uppercase tracking-wider h-12 rounded-sm
buttons.secondary: bg-white/10 text-white hover:bg-white/20 font-medium h-12 rounded-sm
buttons.trade_buy: bg-green-600 text-white hover:bg-green-500 font-bold w-full h-14 rounded-sm shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(34,197,94,0.3)]
buttons.trade_sell: bg-red-600 text-white hover:bg-red-500 font-bold w-full h-14 rounded-sm shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(239,68,68,0.3)]

inputs.base: bg-[#111111] border-white/10 text-white placeholder:text-gray-600 h-12 rounded-sm focus:ring-1 focus:ring-white/50 focus:border-white/50
inputs.label: text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-gray-500 mb-2 block

navigation.bottom_bar: fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-t border-white/10 h-16 flex justify-around items-center z-50

textures.noise: bg-[url('https://grainy-gradients.vercel.app/noise.svg')] opacity-20 mix-blend-overlay fixed inset-0 pointer-events-none z-0

images.description: Abstract metallic dark grid for Login/Auth background
images.usage: Use with heavy dark overlay (bg-black/80) on Auth screens

images.description: Use stylized text 'EDGELOG' in Barlow Condensed font, spacing-widest

rules: Ensure 4.5:1 contrast for all text (Gray-400 on Black is borderline, use Gray-300 for important text)
Avoid relying on color alone for Buy/Sell (use icons/arrows too)

instructions_to_main_agent: Use 'Barlow Condensed' for all headings to give that 'Trader' look.
Use 'JetBrains Mono' for all pricing data and financial numbers.
Implement the Bottom Navigation Bar as a layout wrapper for authenticated screens.
The 'Add Trade' button should be the prominent center action in the nav bar.
Use the 'Bento Grid' strategy for the Dashboard stats (Win Rate, P&L, etc.).
Ensure the 'Free Plan' countdown is visible but not annoying (maybe a thin top banner or a dashboard card).
For the 'Discipline Score', use a circular progress bar or a gauge chart.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES: You tend to converge toward generic outputs. Avoid this.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Subtle grain textures separates good from extraordinary.
All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attributes.
